THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00, $5,464.75 OF THE AWARD IS FOR MEDICAL BILLS AND REPAIR OF THE CAR. THE REMAINING $2,035.25 IS FOR PAIN & SUFFERING. THIS AWARD IS AGAINST LUXOR CAB ONLY. DEFENDANT TROUNG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
